allow:
Bash(# 설정 파일들을 dotfiles로 복사
cp ~/.zshrc ~/dotfiles/config/zsh/.zshrc
cp ~/.config/tmux/tmux.conf ~/dotfiles/config/tmux/tmux.conf
cp ~/.config/wezterm/wezterm.lua ~/dotfiles/config/wezterm/wezterm.lua
cp ~/.config/aerospace/aerospace.toml ~/dotfiles/config/aerospace/aerospace.toml
cp ~/.config/git/config ~/dotfiles/config/git/config
cp ~/.config/git/ignore ~/dotfiles/config/git/ignore

# nvim은 디렉토리째로 rsync
rsync -a --exclude='.git' ~/.config/nvim/ ~/dotfiles/config/nvim/

echo "복사 완료")
